description: A single demand line on a requisition: one item (or service) the requester wants to buy, with quantity, unit price, need date, and supporting detail. The unit of comparison and fulfilment; each line drives an RFQ line, a quotation line, a PO line, a goods receipt, and a match. Free-text items proceed non-blocking with a 'PENDING - New Item' placeholder.

fields.name: requisitionId
fields.label: Requisition
fields.validation: must reference an existing requisition; set from the parent on create; immutable
fields.purpose: The foreign key that binds the line to its demand header so the immutable requisition identifier travels with every line downstream (RFQ -> quote -> PO -> GRN -> invoice).

fields.name: item
fields.label: Item
fields.validation: search master first; a UUID resolves to an existing item; a non-UUID free-text string triggers the non-blocking new-item sub-flow (auto-create: description=string, stock/purchase UoM=line UoM, 6-digit running code)
fields.purpose: What the line is buying. Resolving to the item master gives one canonical record for spend, sourcing history, and source priority; free-text keeps intake unblocked when the catalogue is incomplete.

fields.name: itemCode
fields.label: Item Code
fields.validation: populated from the item master on select; 'PENDING - New Item' while awaiting Procurement Handler approval; read-only
fields.purpose: The human-readable catalogue code shown on the line; the placeholder makes the pending free-text state visible without blocking submission (axiom A2 auto fields never gate).

fields.name: hsCode
fields.label: HS Code
fields.validation: harmonized-system tariff code; relevant for imports; carried onto the RFQ line and customs documents
fields.purpose: The customs tariff classification an import line needs for duty calculation and the Bayan/customs declaration; flows to the RFQ line and landed-cost duty.

fields.name: itemDescription
fields.label: Item Description
fields.validation: auto-populated from the master on select; editable for free-text or to add line-specific spec
fields.purpose: The exact specification suppliers quote against; for a free-text item this becomes the new item's master description.

fields.name: productUsedFor
fields.label: Product Used For
fields.validation: which finished product this line feeds
fields.purpose: Ties consumed materials to the finished product they feed so spend can be reported by finished-product category (axiom A12 analytics on base amounts).

fields.name: quantity
fields.label: Quantity
fields.purpose: How much to buy; multiplied by unit price to form the line value that rolls into the requisition total and the budget check, and the quantity that RFQ/PO/GRN reconcile against.

fields.name: unitOfMeasure
fields.label: Unit of Measure
fields.purpose: The unit the quantity and price are expressed in; carried unchanged through RFQ, PO, and goods receipt so quantities reconcile on one basis.

fields.name: unitPrice
fields.label: Unit Price
fields.validation: may be 0 at creation (flagged, not blocked); requisition currency
fields.purpose: The requester's estimated price in the requisition currency; seeds the requisition total for the soft budget check before real quotes exist. Zero is allowed because the real price comes from sourcing.

fields.name: lineAmount
fields.label: Line Amount
fields.validation: quantity x unitPrice in requisition currency
fields.purpose: The extended value of the line; summed across lines to give the requisition total that drives the base-currency conversion and budget check.

fields.name: availableStock
fields.label: Available Stock
fields.validation: read from inventory if known; informational
fields.purpose: Shows on-hand stock at requisition time so the requester and approver can see whether the buy is necessary; informational, never gates progression (axiom A2).

fields.name: needDate
fields.label: Need Date
fields.purpose: When the line is required; sets the delivery SLA carried to the RFQ and PO, and the baseline for the OTIF on-time calculation at goods receipt (axiom A14).

fields.name: lineNote
fields.label: Line Note
fields.purpose: Line-specific instruction or context (brand, tolerance, packing) that the requisition-level justification cannot carry; read by buyer and approvers.

fields.name: attachments
fields.label: Attachments
fields.purpose: Drawings, specs, or reference sheets that define the item precisely; carried onto the RFQ so suppliers quote the right thing (ISO 8.4.3 information to supplier).

fields.name: serviceName
fields.label: Service Name
fields.purpose: Names the service being procured on a service line, which has no catalogue item; drives the service template variant on the RFQ and the milestone-acceptance path instead of a goods receipt (axiom A8).

fields.name: itemReferenceNumber
fields.label: Item Reference Number
fields.purpose: A reference code for the service (contract line, SOW reference) so the service line can be tracked and matched without a catalogue item code.

fields.name: contractDuration
fields.label: Contract Duration
fields.validation: one of the set; Custom requires a free-text period
fields.purpose: The period a service line runs, which sets the service contract validity and the milestone schedule the two-way match plus milestone acceptance reconciles against (axiom A8).

invariants: A1 requisition identifier travels with the line
A2 mandatory line fields gate stage advance; auto fields (itemCode, availableStock, lineAmount) never gate
A8 service lines use milestone acceptance not GRN
A12 line amounts normalized to base for spend analytics
